lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਜਮੁ ਜੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਸਾਚੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee jam johi na saakai saachai naam samaaeaa |
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, I cannot be touched by the Messenger of Death. I am absorbed in the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਕਰਤਾ ਜੋ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਨਾਇ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh aape aap varatai karataa jo bhaavai so naae laaeaa |
lines.english: The Creator Himself is All-pervading everywhere; He links those with whom He is pleased to His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਏ ਤਾ ਜੀਵੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਖਿਨੁ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak naam le taa jeevai bin naavai khin mar jaaeaa |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak chants the Naam, and so he lives. Without the Name, he would die in an instant. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਓਹੁ ਜਾਇ ਤਿਥੈ ਓਹੁ ਸੁਰਖਰੂ ਉਸ ਕੈ ਮੁਹਿ ਡਿਠੈ ਸਭ ਪਾਪੀ ਤਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jithai ohu jaae tithai ohu surakharoo us kai muhi dditthai sabh paapee tariaa |
lines.english: Wherever he goes, he is recognized as honorable. Seeing his face, all sinners are saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਦੀਬਾਣ ਸਿਉ ਸੋ ਸਭਨੀ ਦੀਬਾਣੀ ਮਿਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo miliaa har deebaan siau so sabhanee deebaanee miliaa |
lines.english: One who is accepted at the Court of the Lord shall be accepted in courts everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਪੂਜੀਐ ਨਾਉ ਮੰਨੀਐ ਨਾਇ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਸਭ ਹਿਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: naau poojeeai naau maneeai naae kilavikh sabh hiriaa |
lines.english: He worships the Name, and believes in the Name; the Name erases all his sinful mistakes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਸੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਮੋ ਪਰਵਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: os antar naam nidhaan hai naamo paravariaa |
lines.english: Within him is the Treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. Through the Naam, he is exalted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਇਕ ਚਿਤਿ ਸੇ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਜਗਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: jinee naam dhiaaeaa ik man ik chit se asathir jag rahiaa |11|
lines.english: Those who meditate on the Name, with one-pointed mind and focused consciousness, remain forever stable in the world. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮੇ ਨੋ ਆਤਮੇ ਦੀ ਪ੍ਰਤੀਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਤਾ ਘਰ ਹੀ ਪਰਚਾ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aatame no aatame dee prateet hoe taa ghar hee parachaa paae |
lines.english: If the individual soul has faith in the Supreme Soul, then it shall obtain realization within its own home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮਾ ਦੇਉ ਪੂਜੀਐ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aatamaa deo poojeeai gur kai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Worship the Divine, Supreme Soul, with the intuitive peace and poise of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਵਿਣੁ ਸਹਜੁ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਲੋਭੁ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur vin sehaj na aavee lobh mail na vichahu jaae |
lines.english: Without the Guru, intuitive wisdom does not come, and the filth of greed does not depart from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮਾ ਅਡੋਲੁ ਨ ਡੋਲਈ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਇ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aatamaa addol na ddolee gur kai bhaae subhaae |
lines.english: The soul becomes steady, and does not waver, by the natural inclination of the Guru's Loving Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਲਗਈ ਮਲੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sache mail na lagee mal laagai doojai bhaae |
lines.english: Filth does not stick to those who are true, but filth attaches itself to those who love duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨੁ ਪਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਭ ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khin pal har naam man vasai sabh atthasatth teerath naae |
lines.english: If the Lord's Name abides within the mind, for a moment, even for an instant, it is like bathing at all the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੋਤੀ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਜੇ ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhotee mool na utarai je atthasatth teerath naae |
lines.english: This filth cannot be washed off, even by bathing at the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕਰਮ ਕਰੇ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੀ ਸਭੁ ਦੁਖੋ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh karam kare ahankaaree sabh dukho dukh kamaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh does deeds in egotism; he earns only pain and more pain.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੈਲਾ ਊਜਲੁ ਤਾ ਥੀਐ ਜਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak mailaa aoojal taa theeai jaa satigur maeh samaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the filthy ones become clean only when they meet and surrender to the True Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਲੋਕੁ ਸਮਝਾਈਐ ਕਦਹੁ ਸਮਝਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh lok samajhaaeeai kadahu samajhaaeaa jaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs may be taught, but how can they really be taught?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਰਲਾਇਆ ਨਾ ਰਲੈ ਪਇਐ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਫਿਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh ralaaeaa naa ralai peiai kirat firaae |
lines.english: The manmukhs do not fit in at all. Because of their past actions, they are condemned to the cycle of reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਵ ਧਾਤੁ ਦੁਇ ਰਾਹ ਹੈ ਹੁਕਮੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: liv dhaat due raah hai hukamee kaar kamaae |
lines.english: Loving attention to the Lord and attachment to Maya are the two separate ways; all act according to the Hukam of the Lord's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰਿਆ ਸਬਦਿ ਕਸਵਟੀ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh aapanaa man maariaa sabad kasavattee laae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh has conquered his own mind, by applying the Touchstone of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਹੀ ਨਾਲਿ ਝਗੜਾ ਮਨ ਹੀ ਨਾਲਿ ਸਥ ਮਨ ਹੀ ਮੰਝਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man hee naal jhagarraa man hee naal sath man hee manjh samaae |
lines.english: He fights with his mind, he settles with his mind, and he is at peace with his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਜੋ ਇਛੇ ਸੋ ਲਹੈ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man jo ichhe so lahai sachai sabad subhaae |
lines.english: All obtain the desires of their minds, through the Love of the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਮਨੈ ਜਿ ਹੋਰੀ ਨਾਲਿ ਲੁਝਣਾ ਜਾਸੀ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vin manai ji horee naal lujhanaa jaasee janam gavaae |
lines.english: Those who struggle with something other than their own mind, shall depart having wasted their lives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦ ਭੁੰਚੀਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam sad bhuncheeai guramukh kaar kamaae |
lines.english: They drink in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam forever; this is how the Gurmukhs act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮਨੁ ਜਿਣੈ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee man jinai har setee liv laae |
lines.english: Those who conquer their own mind, by Guru's Grace, lovingly focus their attention on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੀ ਮਨਹਠਿ ਹਾਰਿਆ ਕੂੜੁ ਕੁਸਤੁ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukhee manahatth haariaa koorr kusat kamaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs, through stubborn-mindedness and the practice of falsehood, lose the game of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਸੰਤ ਸੁਣਹੁ ਜਨ ਭਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਇਕ ਸਾਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: har ke sant sunahu jan bhaaee har satigur kee ik saakhee |
lines.english: O Saints of the Lord, O Siblings of Destiny, listen, and hear the Lord's Teachings, through the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh sach kamaavai manamukh aavai jaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs practice Truth, while the self-willed manmukhs continue coming and going in reincarnation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਧੁਰਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਮੁਖਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਤਿਨਿ ਜਨਿ ਲੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਰਾਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis dhur bhaag hovai mukh masatak tin jan lai hiradai raakhee |
lines.english: Those who have good destiny pre-ordained and inscribed on their foreheads, grasp it and keep it enshrined in the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਕਥਾ ਸਰੇਸਟ ਊਤਮ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਸਹਜੇ ਚਾਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: har amrit kathaa saresatt aootam gur bachanee sahaje chaakhee |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, they intuitively taste the sublime, exquisite and ambrosial sermon of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਭਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਅੰਧਿਆਰਾ ਜਿਉ ਸੂਰਜ ਰੈਣਿ ਕਿਰਾਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: teh bheaa pragaas mittiaa andhiaaraa jiau sooraj rain kiraakhee |
lines.english: The Divine Light shines in their hearts, and like the sun which removes the darkness of night, it dispels the darkness of ignorance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਦਿਸਟੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਅਲਖੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਸੋ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਖੀ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: adisatt agochar alakh niranjan so dekhiaa guramukh aakhee |12|
lines.english: As Gurmukh, they behold with their eyes the Unseen, Imperceptible, Unknowable, Immaculate Lord. ||12||
